summary: iter190 comprehensive testing complete. All 40 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: DeliveryPreferenceCard on /m/briefing/<token> working (4 options visible, click updates preference, flash messages shown), Guest Concierge regression passed (auto-auth, 9 quick action cards, Celebration Nudge, IRD view), Daily Briefing Admin panel loads (requires admin token as expected).
critical_code_review_comments: Capacitor config (/app/capacitor.config.ts) is syntactically valid TypeScript with APP_VARIANT switch for guest/staff bundles
Staff mobile /me endpoint correctly falls back to role='general' when no matching employee record found
PTO flow properly validates dates (YYYY-MM-DD format, end >= start, max 60 days)
Benefits catalog returns 8 default items as expected (Health, Dental, Vision, 401k, PTO, Team meals, Stay discount, Spa)
test_credentials: ADMIN_API_TOKEN=TsjvVFDCvoa4sG4wcVY7ZKF0D7LmA25lTer4edByo5o, Guest: room=1208, last=Reed (William Reed, anniversary, diamond), Fresh briefing token minted for testing
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter190_Staff briefing token for preference testing, created multiple PTO requests for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter190 fully tested. Features: (1) GET/POST /api/daily-briefing/preference - per-staff delivery preference with options [both, email, sms, off], default='both', validates invalid values return 400; (2) GET /api/staff-mobile/me - returns staff info + capabilities with role flags (is_general, is_salary, is_manager, is_owner, can_view_dashboard, can_edit_standup, can_manage_hiring, can_approve_pto, can_view_financials, etc.); (3) PTO flow: POST /api/pto/request (validates dates, rejects end<start, rejects >60 days), GET /api/pto/mine (scoped to staff), POST /api/pto/cancel/{id} (own requests only, 403 for others, 400 for already-canceled), POST /api/pto/decide (admin approve/reject), GET /api/pto/pending (admin queue); (4) GET /api/benefits/mine returns 8-item catalog (Health, Dental, Vision, 401k, PTO, Team meals, Stay discount, Spa); (5) Frontend DeliveryPreferenceCard on /m/briefing/<token> shows 4 options with data-testids briefing-pref-both/email/sms/off, clicking updates preference and shows briefing-pref-flash; (6) Capacitor config at /app/capacitor.config.ts with APP_VARIANT=guest|staff switch. MOCKED: Twilio SMS and Resend email - all paths take graceful queue fallback when keys not set. Capacitor native build not tested here (happens on William's Mac per /app/memory/mobile_build_runbook.md).
